notes: Used an Assignment 1-compatible Go2 low-level checkpoint and a hand-tuned race-assist high-level planner. The planner maps the official 5D track observation to [vx, vy, yaw_rate], with curvature-aware speed, dynamic rescue gains, command smoothing, and tuned high-speed tracking. Best full no-render eval completed 200 m in 150.10 s without fall or boundary violation.
